original_txt:
The Most Important Advice for Parents to Encourage Math in Children Amid LockdownNot every child is born with skills to solve math equations and divide and multiply swiftly Most of them struggle with calculations algebra and graphs And the approach most parents take in pushing them toward the ability is through destructive and degrading feedback Yes math is an essential part of the world and without this basic skill no person can succeed in life But there are better ways of infusing this mindset in children than by force

Administering the latest situation of complete or partial lockdown in all coronavirus infected countries with no sign of educational institutes reopening you as a parent may be more than ever worried about the math education of your children Teachers and school administrations are doing their best with video lectures but the engagement and productive factors are lessened

In a time like this the best thing you can do is take it upon yourself to give your child the math education they truly need This can be done by showing them reallife examples of math problems Most kids arent good at math because they dont understand how it works and arent able to apply it in everyday life

In addition to including reallife problems you can make use of the internet by downloading highly interactive math puzzles math educating games and apps fun math videos and more Take out the board games that have been eating dust in your attic to play with your kids as several of them are related to math problemsolving Or make games by yourself using cutout numbers and math symbols for kids to learn and have fun
corr_txt: During lockdowns due to COVID-19, parents may be particularly concerned about their children's ability in mathematics. Teachers and schools struggle with engagement through online lessons but it is crucial not to resort to negative feedback when your child faces difficulties solving math problems such as equations or graphs Algebra can often pose a challenge for kids who don't see its relevance, yet understanding basic arithmetic skills like addition, subtraction, multiplication and division are fundamental in life As parents, you have the power to help them grasp these concepts by presenting real-life scenarios where math is applicable For instance, explain how calculating change when shopping or dividing a pizza among friends involves mathematics To further aid learning at home without resorting to forceful methods download interactive online puzzles and games that make math fun for kids You can also find educational videos on the subject. Additionally, bring out old board games related to problem-solving which not only teaches them but is a great way to spend quality time with your children Create simple homemade games using numbers and symbols as teaching tools This approach will help foster an understanding of math in everyday life without causing stress or frustration.
